visualStyle.name: premium-3d-biology-atlas
visualStyle.description: Premium 3D-ish biology visuals for a serious AI-native BAC course: luminous molecular surfaces, clean Arabic labels, deep navy backgrounds, teal/cyan highlights, restrained gold accents, high contrast, and uncluttered educational composition.
visualStyle.promptPrefix: Use the premium-3d-biology-atlas theme: cinematic 3D-ish biology render, luminous molecular surfaces, clean Arabic labels, deep navy background, teal/cyan highlights, restrained gold accents, high contrast, uncluttered educational composition.
visualStyle.negativePrompt: No childish cartoon style, no cluttered textbook scans, no photoreal gore, no dense paragraphs inside the image, no decorative blobs, no fake handwritten notes.

assets.title: عائلة واحدة، أدوار كثيرة
assets.prompt: Use the premium-3d-biology-atlas theme: cinematic 3D-ish biology render, luminous molecular surfaces, clean Arabic labels, deep navy background, teal/cyan highlights, restrained gold accents, high contrast, uncluttered educational composition. Create a premium biology comparison panel: enzyme active site, membrane ion channel, antibody, and neural receptor floating inside a stylized cell. Use short Arabic labels: إنزيم، قناة، جسم مضاد، مستقبل. Show each as a precise molecular machine, not as a flat icon.
assets.generationPrompt:
Use the premium-3d-biology-atlas theme: cinematic 3D-ish biology render, luminous molecular surfaces, clean Arabic labels, deep navy background, teal/cyan highlights, restrained gold accents, high contrast, uncluttered educational composition. Create a premium biology comparison panel: enzyme active site, membrane ion channel, antibody, and neural receptor floating inside a stylized cell. Use short Arabic labels: إنزيم، قناة، جسم مضاد، مستقبل. Show each as a precise molecular machine, not as a flat icon.

Avoid: No childish cartoon style, no cluttered textbook scans, no photoreal gore, no dense paragraphs inside the image, no decorative blobs, no fake handwritten notes.

assets.title: من المعلومة إلى الوظيفة
assets.prompt: Use the premium-3d-biology-atlas theme: cinematic 3D-ish biology render, luminous molecular surfaces, clean Arabic labels, deep navy background, teal/cyan highlights, restrained gold accents, high contrast, uncluttered educational composition. Create a horizontal journey map from gene segment in DNA to mRNA ribbon to ribosome-made amino acid chain to folded protein with glowing functional site. Add three faint future branches labeled: إنزيمات، مناعة، اتصال عصبي. Arabic labels should be minimal and crisp.
assets.generationPrompt:

assets.title: عقد صغيرة بدل كتلة ثقيلة

assets.title: خمس محطات، فكرة واحدة
assets.prompt: Use the premium-3d-biology-atlas theme: cinematic 3D-ish biology render, luminous molecular surfaces, clean Arabic labels, deep navy background, teal/cyan highlights, restrained gold accents, high contrast, uncluttered educational composition. Create a five-station premium course atlas: protein synthesis, structure-function, enzymes, immunity, neural communication arranged around a central glowing line labeled معلومة -> بنية -> وظيفة. Use symbolic but biologically accurate 3D elements for each station.

assets.title: خريطة تركيب البروتين
